feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Business One 2005 Setup
entry.content:
Hello

I am currently facing a significant issue and am in search of the SAP Business One 2005 A (6.80.318) version with Service Pack 01, Patch Level 09. Unfortunately, I have been unable to locate it.

So could someone kindly assist me by sending the setup for this specific version

Best regards

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: I am unable to create a build process automation. The error displayed is " Insufficient privileges to perform this action".

entry.title: Response truncated when calling API from SAP Build APPS button
entry.content:
Dear All,

 

I am stuck at the final step of my APP. I am able to test the API successfully from POST MAN and also from the Data tab in SAP Build Apps.

The API call: get the context of the workflow which contains an automation which returns a URL of a pdf document.

https://api.sap.com/api/SPA_Workflow_Runtime/path/get_v1_workflow_instances__workflowInstanceId__context

 

The API response in the data tab of SAP Build Apps:

The property: pdfUri is the one that I need.

The same when called in Build Apps on click of the Get File button, I only get the "startEvent" object but the second object containing pdfUri is missing:

 

Response in developer tools:
{
"status": 200,
"statusText": "OK",
"headers": {
"cache-control": "no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate",
"content-type": "application/json",
"date": "Fri, 02 Feb 2024 16:02:18 GMT",
"expires": "0",
"pragma": "no-cache",
"referrer-policy": "no-referrer",
"server": "SAP",
"vary": "accept-encoding",
"x-content-type-options": "nosniff",
"x-correlationid": "fc5f61f2-bb45-4c79-4672-2954529b364c",
"x-frame-options": "DENY",
"x-ratelimit-burst-capacity": "200",
"x-ratelimit-remaining": "178",
"x-ratelimit-replenish-rate": "150",
"x-ratelimit-requested-tokens": "1",
"x-vcap-request-id": "fc5f61f2-bb45-4c79-4672-2954529b364c",
"x-xss-protection": "1; mode=block",
"strict-transport-security": "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload;",
"connection": "close"
},
"responseText": "{\"startEvent\":{\"clientid\":\"masked\",\"lastname\":\"Dsa\",\"firstname\":\"Ron\",\"issuedate\":\"2023-12-12\",\"clientsecret\":\"masked\"}}"
}

 

Could you please let me know what am I doing wrong here. I believe this is obviously a small thing but I cannot put my head around it.

 

Thanks in advance !

Best Regards,

Geet

entry.title: Unsubscribe SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a strange error when I am trying to unsubscribe SAP Process Automation (Free plan) in my BTP subaccount. Error message tells nothing at all: "Couldn't unsubscribe from SAP Build Process Automation".

entry.title: Can't retrieve emails using Outlook SDK in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a problem with task Search Email (Outlook) automation in SAP Build Process Automation using Outlook SDK. I'm picking emails from specific folder to further process and move to another folder.

The problem is that when I run my automation in Attended Mode in Desktop Agent, no email is found when lauching for the first time. Then I click 'start' again, an email is correctly found, so the flow goes on. In summary emails are properly picked from given folder, but only second time I launch my automation. There are no exceptions/failures, just 0 emails found.

I think my setup is correct, I Open Outlook Instance, then Search Email, and Release + Close Outlook instance at the end.

What could be the problem here? I'm using latest SDK version from the store.

BR,

Adrian

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Filter in Basic Table Data Component
entry.content:
Hi @MaxSt 

I am not sure how you arrived there.
Can you please share the learning journey either title or URL and the lesson or exercise  where you run into this issue.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Azure availability
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a timeline for when SAP Build Process Automation be available in Azure regions?

Thanks

John

entry.title: SAP Build Trial: Can not save the app
entry.content:
Hello,

I have set up an BTP trial account, which worked (I have my account / subaccount).

I also subscribed SAP Build (where I can log on and start it).

When I try to save my test app, I always get this:

My System: Windows 10, Browser Edge (can not use otherdue to work restrictions).

Any hints?

entry.title: The capture you want to add in "Output.." is not compatible with the screen criteria.
entry.content:
Error: The capture you want to add in "Output Parameter Determination" is not compatible with the screen criteria. If you add the capture you might need to update the screen recognition criteria.

BOT: Activation Accelerators - In-App Configuration for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Scope Items J60 and 1NT (6PT)

I can't add new capture for declare new elements.

Other error is when i try to add declare new elements that have incorrect positions.

Best regards,

Angel Gutierrez

entry.title: How can i add the agent to SAP BPA guided experience with a P user?
entry.content:
Hello, im new here and i want to build a simple bot in SAP BPA. I logged in that platform with a P user

and installed the desktop agent 3 and the extension for the browser (chrome). But when i try to add the tenant for the agent (in Control tower -> Agents), the page doesn't load

 

(i have the message of the next figure sometimes) and i don't know why this is happen. If someone knows the reason please tell me.

I'll be grateful with any answers. Greetings

entry.title: Appgyver composer pro to new SAP Build
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have developed real time application hosted in Playstore via appgyver composer pro older version and you gave deadline of migraating to new SAP Build Apps,

It was my bad and i missed it is their anyway i can migrate from old version to new sap build apps?

This is very helpful since my app is in use from long back and planning for enhancement

entry.title: Component card(UI Card) support for BTP standard workzone ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Is component card support for BTP standard workzone ?

entry.title: SAP B1 Service layer for Goods Return Requests
entry.content:
Hi,

 

May I know if there is service layer API for Goods return requests?

 

 

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: How do I get and set x-csrf-token and set-cookie in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I need a CSRF token to POST to S/4HANA (CAL) using SAP Build Process automation, I am getting an error message "CSRF token validation failed".

I tried to find the cause in POSTMAN, but as you can see in the blog below, the cookie needs to be set as well with the S/4HANA version upgrade.

CSRF Token Validation Failed in POST method in Gateway Client

So we are trying the method of getting and setting the x-crsf-token and set-cookie manually. By setting the header input and output respectively in the action project, we were able to successfully retrieve and send the values and update them.

On the other hand, when I actually try to use the action in the process, it does not work and I get a 403 error. I assume that this is because the item specified as "set-cookie" in the action project has been converted to a variable called "setCookie", and the schema does not match.

Action 'd2272d2e-e5ba-4699-8a65-6e7baa2f8f36' failed with the following error: 'Error thrown from action runtime library: Failed to validate received response against output schema defined in action metadata for action Returns product master record by product number: instance.setCookie is not
instance.setCookie is not of a type(s) string

What we want to know is the following two points

  • Can we retrieve and send the value even if there is an item with a hyphen in the header?
  • Is it possible to update the cookie without setting it in some other way?

Below is what we are trying.

  • system : SAP S/4HANA 2023
  • method : PATCH
  • path : /sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product('11')
  • Success in POSTMAN and action project

Thanks,

Naoto

entry.title: Web App deploy - Blank screen
entry.content:
Hi,

I deployed my web app on git hub, but the page is complete blank. The only thong it is working is the image asset, nothing else is visible.

Can you help me?

entry.title: Unable to Create SAP build Automation application on SAP BTP account
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Please i am going throught the learning journey for SAP Build on SAP BTP, following the instructions there i noticed that i couldn't subscribe to an SAP Build Process Automation application. I always get an error when i try to do so. They recommended that I ask for help here in the community. Please I would appreciate every help I can get. Thanks in advance. See error screen shot below.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Basic Table with Adapter and Pagination
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm able to establish an OData integration in SAP Build Apps. I pull in the basic table with adapter and two buttons (Previous and Next) to navigate the pages.

However, the data remains static in the table after the Page Mounted event.

What I'm saying is - the basic table gets populated with data with the Page Mounted event. Every other Event does not refresh the data on the table. 

At first, i thought it was the variables. But I've tried App variables and Page Variables.

Both do not work with the pagination in the basic table with adapter.

The expectation is that with the component tap (button tap), the current page increments or decrements by 1.

The formula works. I've tested it on the Page Mounted event.

I'm even able to get it to display on the page. 

I'm able to get the total number of pages and total number of records.

But the basic table with adapter only gets populated with the Page Mounted event and no other events will get it to refresh.

I've tried modifying the properties of the table but it doesn't have the refresh property. If you create the refresh manually, you can't find the Internal Component that was mentioned in the other blogs.

I've seen a few questions about the Basic Table being populated from other Database via odata but they're running into the same problem.

Yes, i can switch to lists but i really want this basic table with adapter to work with pagination.

Any other recommendations?

I can export and upload my app here if anyone wants to have a look.

entry.title: Build process automation subscription is not visible in service market place
entry.content: Hi All, today when I am trying to search for Sap build process automation subscription in market place it's not visible here. Please help me

entry.title: SBPA Automations not able to detect SAP Easy Access Screen
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created an automation and in the first step , i have given a condition to determine whether the SAP Easy Access screen exists or not , if exists , the bot should run with that particular instance but in my case the bot is not able to recognize the Easy access screen and continue to run the automation with a new login.
But when i have already the same user open i.e. the credentials i used in the automation, the screen is getting identified.Please help me with this.

Thanks & Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: Sap AppBuilder IoS compilation error
entry.content:
Hi, starting from the previous week, the IOS building fails with this error:

 

Runtime version: 4.9.148; AB version: 2.0.0-alpha.1 COMMAND: npxrnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\"" FAILED with ERROR: Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\""

Everything seems to be configured in the right way. please help us!

Please give support to the Appbuilder community!!
